properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let praise awaken Inside of every heart For He is awesome Our God is awesome The ground is shaking As we're singing loud For He is awesome Our God is awesome You are faithful, and You're able to do anything So I trust You, never doubt You, Cause You hold it all

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Everyday of my life I'll praise You Every moment I'll bless Your name You have given me love unfailing H - E - Y H - E - Y

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let praise awaken Inside of every heart For He is awesome Our God is awesome You are faithful, and You're able to do anything So I trust You, never doubt You, Cause You hold it all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Everyday of my life I'll praise You Every moment I'll bless Your name You have given me love unfailing H - E - Y

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Let praise awaken in this generation Let praise awaken all around the world Let praise awaken in this generation Let praise awaken all around the world
